<!-- fixture_expected: pass -->
<!-- fixture_purpose: forward-mode source-backed rows are allowed without backtest cutoff checks -->

# Commission Signal Board Fixture: valid source-backed forward

### 1. Commission Intake Receipt

```yaml
commission_id: fixture_valid_source_backed_forward
mode: forward
candidate_or_subject: Fixture Product F
decision_context: Exercise forward-mode classifier handoff after source-backed evidence is supplied.
market_or_geography: US
time_window: current
input_status: complete
missing_required_inputs: []
non_goals_preserved:
  - no demand classification
```

### 4. Signal Board Rows

| Row ID | Source family | Subfamily | Surface | Observable | Signal role | Row purpose | Recency status | Recency attention | Graph role | Graph weight hint | Evidence status | Provenance needed | Surface cutoff status | Cutoff status | Handoff note |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| SBR-001 | reviews | retailer reviews | PDP reviews | current experience claims | review_experience | signal_unit | current_state | high | node_candidate | medium | source_backed | review URL and review date supplied | not_applicable | not_applicable | Eligible for forward classifier handoff |

### 8. Demand-Classifier Handoff Packet

```yaml
classifier_handoff_packet:
  candidate_or_subject: Fixture Product F
  decision_context: Exercise forward-mode classifier handoff after source-backed evidence is supplied.
  mode: forward
  cutoff_date: null
  signal_rows_for_handoff:
    - SBR-001
  counterevidence_rows_for_handoff: []
  source_family_gaps: []
  provenance_gaps: []
  cutoff_uncertainties: []
  classifier_mapping_status: classifier_owned
  prohibited_claims:
    - no demand verdict
```
